channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattresses and sofa, 14th March
item.description:
Lots of discarded waste which is causing a fire hazard against a residential apartment building
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gillett Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 14th March
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Remove bins, 14th March
item.description:
Remove bins please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 bags of domestic waste dumped overnight, 14th March
item.description:
Ongoing problem for last few weeks. Someone dumping domestic waste besides bin. This time 4 bags dumped, bags damaged so waste spilling out all over the pavement. Includes dirty nappies once again, also chicken bones which will be hazardous to local dogs.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pier Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvington Park Metal Container By the Park Building graffiti on it., 14th March
item.description:
Graffiti needs to be removed please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, 14th March
item.description:
Fire hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kentmere Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 14th March
item.description:
Interesting that 160a have the box from a new mattress on their rubbish pile
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire road covered in litter, 14th March
item.description:
The whole of Somerford Grove is covered in litter and mess
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerford Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Deep pothole, 14th March
item.description:
As per photo. Please repair as breaking up further

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Grove, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish in the road, 14th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish dumped in the road west bound. possibly from a skip
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mulberry Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish broken glass and fly tipping outside charity shop, 14th March
item.description:
Rubbish broken glass and fly tipping outside community hospice charity shop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Finchley Road & Frognal Station, 14th March
item.description:
The pothole around the manhole cover outside the station is getting really bad. I fell and have bad bruises, I'm concerned that if someone less able than me will get seriously injured if it isnt fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Billy Fury Way, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign knocked out, 14th March
item.description:
Overnight someone has hit, knocked over the street sign. Currently lying on the floor as a trip hazard for public.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Wellington Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs urgent repainting for safety. The cycle lane road markings have worn out and some are completely missing., 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Way, Coldblow, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish left at bin, 14th March
item.description:
Happens often here so please check for information to prosecute. We do not want this here. Please check.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road damage, 14th March

item.title: Shutters, 14th March
item.description:
Owner leaves but locals must put up with it. Please clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Kennel Hill, East Dulwich, Greater London
